introSection: Vildkatten is a Pinfari Zyklon roller coaster located at Sommerland Sjælland in Nykøbing, Sjælland, Denmark. Vildkatten is Danish for WildCat.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The train immediately takes a right turn upon departing the station and climbs the lift hill before taking another right turn and dropping into a left turn. The train then executes the tall vertical loop and goes through a series of turns before braking.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.

fullText:
Vildkatten is a Pinfari Zyklon roller coaster located at Sommerland Sjælland in Nykøbing, Sjælland, Denmark. Vildkatten is Danish for WildCat.

The train immediately takes a right turn upon departing the station and climbs the lift hill before taking another right turn and dropping into a left turn. The train then executes the tall vertical loop and goes through a series of turns before braking.

3 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.
